parameters-en.C1 Drive: Controls the amount of Channel 1 gain applied to the signal, which influences the level of distortion.
parameters-en.C1 Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ of the tonestack on Channel 1.
parameters-en.C1 Mid: Controls the midrange frequency EQ of the tonestack on Channel 1.
parameters-en.C1 MidFreq: Sets the frequency boosted or cut by the Mid parameter on Channel 1.
parameters-en.C1 Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ of the tonestack on Channel 1.
parameters-en.C1 Master: Controls the Master Volume of Channel 1.
parameters-en.C2 Drive: Controls the amount of Channel 2 gain applied to the signal, which influences the level of distortion.
parameters-en.C2 Bass: Controls the low frequency EQ of the tonestack on Channel 2.
parameters-en.C2 Mid: Controls the midrange frequency EQ of the tonestack on Channel 2.
parameters-en.C2 MidFreq: Sets the frequency boosted or cut by the Mid parameter on Channel 2.
parameters-en.C2 Treble: Controls the high frequency EQ of the tonestack on Channel 2.
parameters-en.C2 Master: Controls the Master Volume of Channel 2.
parameters-en.Input Pad: Boosts or cuts the input signal into the preamp by 10 dB.
parameters-en.C1 Boost: When on, supplies an additional boost to Channel 1 for noticeably more gain and distortion.
parameters-en.C2 Boost: When on, supplies an additional boost to Channel 2 for noticeably more gain and distortion.
parameters-en.Limiter: When on, enables the built-in limiter.
parameters-en.Threshold: Sets the level above which limiting is applied. Lower values limit more of the signal; higher values limit only louder parts of the signal.
parameters-en.Level: Controls the overall level of the Preamp block.
